description: Native American English. Female, mid-50s. High quality, clean studio. Persona: composed political broker. Emotion: cool, controlled, authoritative. A measured low contralto with flattened, placeless podium diction sanded out of any one region; deliberate cadence, precise consonants. She never raises it, she lowers it and lets the pauses do the pressing.
text: [serious] The situation requires that we be honest about what we control... and what we only borrow. There must be a mechanism for that. [deliberate] I never raise my voice. I lower it... and the room leans in.
